title: Northern Bands
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Northern Bands''' tribal faction was a collection of [[Alwari]] clans on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] that included the [[Pangay Ous]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
